svg.text: FROM VOID TO SELF-AWARE CYBERNETIC ORGANISM IN 14 DAYS
Gateway, version vectors, consensus, multi-node reconciliation
SIL-6 sync | HA leader election | Zero-IP identity routing
Zenoh mesh topology, quorum governance, cluster orchestration
4 Zenoh routers (TCP 7447) | Mandala of 16 nodes | A2A messaging
OODA supervisor, cortex ReAct loop, 6-tier hedged inference
52 GRL rules | Gemma 3/4 LLM | 5-tier voice cascade | RAG pipeline
Podman containers, 7-tier boot DAG, image lifecycle
16-container genome | Apoptosis | CPU governor | Build EMA
Planning state, SQLite/DuckDB, Smriti knowledge base
2,609 holons | FTS5 RAG | Semantic cache | PipelineTracer
A2UI catalog, forms, grids, badges, buttons
NIF bridge, debug trace, OTel telemetry
Guardian approval | Psi-0..5 invariants | Emergency stop
मूलाधार — The immovable root of all
नैनं छिन्दन्ति शस्त्राणि नैनं दहति पावकः
Weapons cannot cut it, fire cannot burn it — the Self is indestructible
